name: disposition
description: Disposition-completion schema pack (v0.6). Validates the structure of typed Disposition actions (actionClass controlled vocab) and surrogate-vs-solver Discrepancy nodes when present. Opt-in (uofa ... --pack disposition); never required of a v0.5 package. The ProfileDisposition profile machinery itself lives in core (additive dispatcher branch); this pack adds the node-type shapes. Decision content (actionClass) is action-region, not measurement-region. Schema only — contains no pipeline/model logic.
author: Vishnu Vettrivel
